notes: It had worked on a previous version of proton (where I played for several hours). Upgrading the prefix from 4.2 to 4.11 had issues, but wiping it and making a fresh prefix fixed them. No tweaks were required. Oddly, this doesn't work on a system that I have that uses Nvidia hardware and 64GB of RAM.
title: Shattered Union

notes: I had to do `protontricks 3960 videomemorysize=512` to make this stop crashing at launch.
title: Shattered Union
